files.description: Observed historical series used directly by the dashboard UI and KPI calculations.
Field-level citations and derivation notes for dashboard metrics.
Training dataset for forecasting, extended back to 2005 and enriched with external driver variables.
Field-level citations and notes for the forecast dataset and external drivers.
Baseline simulator assumptions, scenario ranges, and documented driver definitions for policy experiments.
Reference metadata for NMEO-OP targets and policy context.
